---
title: "John Yonge Anderson Morshead"
---

## John Yonge Anderson Morshead

**Dates:** (11 June 1846-1923)

### Description

cousin of CMY, barrister

### Biography

Eldest son of the Rev. John Philip Anderson Morshead and Alethea Yonge, he graduated from University College Oxford in 1869, and qualified as a barrister at the Middle Temple in 1873.  He married (21 April 1880) his cousin Helen Beatrice Anderson Morshead (1853/4-1922). He was interested in local history and has an obituary in <i>Transactions of the Devonshire Association</i> 55,56 (1924).

### Letters

- Letter from October 5, 1868
- Letter from July 25th [1863]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
